title: High FantasyRPG
description: A modpack the gives the fantasy feel while keeping performance in mind.
body:
Looking to change up your Minecraft experience? Then this modpack might be for you.

This modpack was curated to bring a fantasy RPG feel to Minecraft while keeping performance in mind. There are tons of mods that will alter the game to keep you engaged and wanting to explore the world around you.



All credit for the mods in this pack go to the respective creators. Without their hard work this modpack would not be possible.




Credit for Aurora's Shaders included are resirved by the creator. Links can be found [Here](https://modrinth.com/shader/auroras-shaders) and [Here](https://github.com/ComplementaryDevelopment/ComplementaryShadersV4/tree/main)
